Name: Jetstream
Author: pimmesz
Description: Full Claude control on your Stream Deck: a live per-project status board (working / needs you / done), an attention doorbell, usage gauges, and preset headless launches.

Actions.Name: Project status
Actions.Tooltip: One project per key: glows with its live Claude status (working / needs you / done). Press to jump into it.

Actions.Name: Fleet roll-up
Actions.Tooltip: One always-visible key summarising every project: N working / waiting / done. Colour = the worst state present, so 'is anything waiting on me?' is answerable even when projects outnumber keys.

Actions.Name: Attention
Actions.Tooltip: Lights up when any project's Claude needs your input. Press to jump there.

Actions.Name: Usage gauge
Actions.Tooltip: Your Claude subscription's 5-hour and 7-day usage, live.

Actions.Name: CI / PR status
Actions.Tooltip: One always-visible key: the worst CI state across your open afterburner PRs (green / red / running), flashing when CI newly fails. Needs the `gh` CLI, logged in.

Actions.Name: Launch preset
Actions.Tooltip: Fire a preset headless `claude -p` prompt in a project. Subscription auth; the API key is stripped.

Actions.Name: Approve / Deny
Actions.Tooltip: Approve or deny the oldest pending Claude permission request from the deck. Place one Approve key and one Deny key.

Actions.Name: Jetstream settings
Actions.Tooltip: Plugin settings + manage your fleet (add/scan repos, no terminal) + a health check + switch to the Jetstream layout. Press to toggle high-contrast colours.

Actions.Name: Fleet dial
Actions.Tooltip: Stream Deck +: rotate to scan your whole fleet, the touchscreen shows the selected project's live Claude status. Press to jump in; long-press to interrupt.
